<?php /* * This file is part of Crawler Detect - the web crawler detection library. * * (c) Mark Beech <m@rkbee.ch> * * This source file is subject to the MIT license that is bundled * with this source code in the file LICENSE. */ namespace Jaybizzle\CrawlerDetect\Fixtures; abstract class AbstractProvider { /** * The data set. * * @var array */ protected $data; /** * Return the data set. * * @return array */ public function getAll() { return $this->data; } }
